ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bam_data" (
  "bam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BAM data record */,
  "bam_service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the BAM service associated with the data record */,
  "bam_month_id" INTEGER /* Month ID for which the data was collected */,
  "bam_avg_res_time" REAL /* Average response time for the service */,
  "bam_max_res_time" REAL /* Maximum response time for the service */,
  "bam_min_res_time" REAL /* Minimum response time for the service */,
  "bam_req_count" INTEGER /* Number of requests for the service */,
  "bam_res_count" INTEGER /* Number of responses for the service */,
  "bam_fault_count" INTEGER /* Number of faults for the service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bam_data_bam_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("bam_month_id") REFERENCES bam_months ("bam_month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bam_data_bam_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("bam_service_id") REFERENCES bam_services ("bam_service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bam_services" (
  "bam_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BAM service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_status" TEXT /* Status of the service (e.g. active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bam_service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bam_months" (
  "bam_month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BAM month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "month_description" TEXT /* Description of the month */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the month */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bam_month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user assigned to the service */,
  "bam_service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service being assigned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_assignments_bam_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("bam_service_id") REFERENCES bam_services ("bam_service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g. email, sms) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "bam_service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service associated with the threshold */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g. response time, fault count) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threshold was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threshold was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_bam_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("bam_service_id") REFERENCES bam_services ("bam_service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "integration_description" TEXT /* Description of the integration */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g. api, database) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the integration associated with the log */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log was received */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g. info, error) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_logs_integration_id FOREIGN KEY ("integration_id") REFERENCES integrations ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g. monthly, quarterly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report associated with the data */,
  "bam_service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service associated with the data */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report data was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Actual data for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_bam_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("bam_service_id") REFERENCES bam_services ("bam_service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of dashboard (e.g. service, system) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dashboard associated with the widget */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "widget_description" TEXT /* Description of the widget */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of widget (e.g. chart, table) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the widget was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the widget was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
